scores.correctness_notes: Covers all fields correctly with accurate descriptions. Includes all four supported fields (interface, limit, optional, scope) with correct types and defaults.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: describes scope as 'relevant for Kubernetes sidecar charms' when the gold standard says it's only relevant for machine charms (not Kubernetes). Also omits the interface naming constraints (only a-z and -, cannot start with juju-).
